name: Chocolate Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter in a double boiler, stirring until smooth. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the powdered sugar, whipping cream, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Gradually stir in the melted chocolate until the frosting reaches a creamy consistency.
4. If needed, let the frosting sit at room temperature for about 30 minutes to set slightly before spreading with a knife. This is only necessary if your chocolate was still warm when incorporated.
